summary: Joe Reis delivered a keynote at SLC DevOpsDays 2023 about improving collaboration between development teams and data teams, framing it as 'shifting left and right.' The talk was notable for its interactive format with a predominantly DevOps and software engineering audience rather than data professionals.
key_points: Dev teams and data teams need to find better ways to collaborate
Cross-functional audiences (DevOps, software engineers) benefit from understanding data team perspectives
Interactive, discussion-based formats can be more effective than traditional keynotes
money_quotes: The audience was largely a non-data audience, comprised mostly of DevOps and software engineers. Talk about a tough crowd!
key_insight: Bridging the gap between development and data teams requires actively engaging with non-data audiences and fostering cross-functional dialogue.
